skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle. Affects self. Summons 4 Near Feathers.
skill1.note: Note says 'Feather burst-gen (4 at battle start) skipped as minor.' One-time 4×90.81%=363.24% true damage over the fight — negligible vs 180s total.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Burst Skill Stage 3. Affects self. ATK ▲ 70.12% for 10 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[0]: trigger stageEnter stage 3 → buff atkPct 70.12 / 10s
skill1.note: Note confirms Prydwen verifies it lands BEFORE burst cast and buffs burst damage — matches engine ordering.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when Near Feather is summoned. Affects 1 random enemy. Near Feather Attack: Deals 90.81% of final ATK as true damage.
skill2.where: skill2[1] (burstCast flatDamage 3087.54 = 34×90.81, true, crit:true, noRange:true) + skill2[2] (fullBurstEnd flatDamage 544.86 = 6×90.81, true, crit:true, noRange:true)
skill2.note: Per-instance damage folded into two lumps: 34 feathers at burst cast, 6 at each full-burst end. Cadence is Prydwen-sourced, not kit-derivable. crit:true + noRange:true flags motivated engine features per note. Single-boss sim collapses '1 random enemy' targeting.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when attacking with Full Charge. Affects self. Charge Damage ▲ 80% for 1 shot(s).
skill2.where: skill2[0]: passive → buff chargeDamagePct 80 (no duration = permanent)
skill2.note: Deliberate approximation: kit says 'for 1 shot' but note explains 'primes every next shot ~= permanent +80' — since she full-charges every shot, the 1-shot refresh is effectively permanent uptime. Duration dropped.

burst.where: skill2[1] burstCast lump (34×90.81 includes the 6 burst-summoned feathers)
burst.note: No standalone 'summon 6' block; the damage consequence is folded into the 34-feather burst lump in skill2[1]. The 6 are a subset of the 34 total per Prydwen counts.
Exact values at skill level 10. Stacks with skill2's permanent +80%.

burst.kitLine: Affects 10 enemy unit(s) with the highest final DEF. Deals 300.02% of final ATK as true damage.
burst.note: '10 highest DEF' targeting is irrelevant in single-boss sim. Damage value exact at level 10.

extraModeledMechanics.kitLine: ORB GAUGE (not in skill prose — datamined arena data: special_burst_gauge add_interval_from_start 5.6, interval 170f)
extraModeledMechanics.where: skill2[3]: passive dot atkPct 0 / 999s / intervalSec 2.83 — zero-damage tick drives skillGauge (560 energy per tick per note)
extraModeledMechanics.note: Ein's orb generates 560 burst-gauge energy for the team every ~2.83s. Modeled as a zero-damage permanent dot whose ticks drive skillGauge. Source: nikke-synergy arena datamine, not kit prose.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: Near Feather cadence (34 per burst, 6 per rotation between bursts) is Prydwen-sourced, not kit-derivable — needs ein-focused recording (U8).
documentedConfounds.why: ks-extracts finding F1: the 34-feather lump is the dominant damage source and its count is an unverified community estimate. If real count differs, all feather damage scales linearly.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2: between-burst feather trickle keyed to full-burst COUNT (6 per FB end), not to time — long rotations under-count, fast rotations over-count.
documentedConfounds.why: ks-extracts finding F2: real trickle is time-cadenced, not FB-count-keyed. Comps with non-standard rotation lengths get systematic over/under-credit, driving spread across teams.

documentedConfounds.text: burst: 34-feather lump resolves at cast-instant, BEFORE her own True Damage ▲ 55.3% buff and teammates' FB-entry auras register (block order).
documentedConfounds.why: ks-extracts finding F1: x1.553 under-credit on the lump. Real feathers land inside the 10s window with buffs up. Fix requires delaySec on the lump block. This alone explains the top ~35% of the COLD gap.

documentedConfounds.text: skill1: 4 Near Feathers summoned at battle start skipped as minor.
documentedConfounds.why: One-time 4×90.81%=363.24% true damage at t=0 — negligible fraction of 180s total output. Correctly classified as inert.

documentedConfounds.text: Charge Damage 80% 'for 1 shot' modeled as permanent passive (no duration).
documentedConfounds.why: She full-charges every shot cycle, so the 1-shot buff refreshes before it expires. Permanent uptime is a faithful approximation for auto-play SR.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Ein as a true-damage SR attacker whose core loop is: permanent +80% charge damage (skill2 passive), ATK +70.12% on every burst-stage-3 entry (skill1), and a burst that grants +55.3% true damage / +140.68% charge damage for 10s plus a 300.02% true nuke. Her signature Near Feather mechanic is approximated as two flat-damage lumps (34×90.81% at burst cast, 6×90.81% at each full-burst end) using Prydwen-sourced instance counts, with crit:true and noRange:true flags. The three documented caveats — unverified feather counts, FB-count-keyed trickle vs real time cadence, and cast-instant lump ordering before the true-damage buff — are the known drivers of the COLD 0.805 ratio and 0.195 MAD. The orb gauge (560 energy / 2.83s) is modeled as a zero-damage dot driving skillGauge, sourced from arena datamine rather than kit prose.
